industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Ningxia Jiaze Renewables Corporation Limited
summary: Ningxia Jiaze Renewables Corporation Limited invests in, constructs, develops, operates, and manages energy projects. It operates wind power, photovoltaic, solar power, and micro-grid projects. The company was formerly known as Ningxia Jiaze Power Generation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningxia Jiaze Renewables Corporation Limited in August 2015. Ningxia Jiaze Renewables Corporation Limited was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Yinchuan, China.
